# Xnlab Studio (XNLAB)

> Digital Atmosphere Studio for Premium Brands. XNLAB creates cinematic websites, campaign systems and AI-enhanced visual worlds for hospitality, architecture, wellness, nightlife and culture-led brands. By application only.

The studio operates from a single mark — XNLAB — and a single email: studio@xnlab.io. Work happens through fixed-scope projects (no hourly billing) and a monthly Visual Engine offer for brands that need continuous direction. Direction over content. AI extends production; it does not dilute the direction.

## Pages

- [Home](https://xnlab.io): Landing — wordmark, problem statement, services preview, the six worlds, proof, apply.
- [Services](https://xnlab.io/services): Six engagements with pricing in EUR — Campaign System (from €5,000), Digital Atmosphere (from €10,000), Brand World (from €25,000), Visual Engine (from €4,000/month), Technical / Growth Add-ons (from €1,500), Upgrade Sprint (from €2,500–€4,000).
- [The Universe](https://xnlab.io/worlds): Entry to the XNLAB universe. Mythology (Central Core, ORUN, XIO, anomalies) and the six World Cores.
- [World 01 — Hospitality & Experience](https://xnlab.io/worlds/hospitality-experience): Amber Gold. Hospitality brand systems, atmosphere design, restaurant identity.
- [World 02 — Nightlife & Cultural Events](https://xnlab.io/worlds/nightlife-cultural-events): Electric Violet. Club identity, event direction, cultural venue branding.
- [World 03 — Luxury & Lifestyle Brands](https://xnlab.io/worlds/luxury-lifestyle-brands): Ivory Pearl. Fashion identity, perfume direction, editorial systems.
- [World 04 — Architecture & Spatial Design](https://xnlab.io/worlds/architecture-spatial-design): Mineral Stone Grey. Architectural brand systems, spatial identity.
- [World 05 — Music & Cultural Artists](https://xnlab.io/worlds/music-cultural-artists): Midnight Indigo. Artist identity, album direction, tour aesthetic.
- [World 06 — Cultural & Digital Worlds](https://xnlab.io/worlds/cultural-digital-worlds): Iridescent Cyan. Digital identity, AI-native direction, generative aesthetics.
- [Selected Works](https://xnlab.io/work): Case studies (currently 3 internal studies; real client work in progress).
- [About](https://xnlab.io/about): Studio philosophy, approach, beliefs, practice areas.
- [Process](https://xnlab.io/process): How we work in four movements — Diagnose, Direct, Build, Activate. Each engagement closes a perception gap and ships a coherent system.
- [Collaboration](https://xnlab.io/collaboration): Practical notes on engaging the studio — when to reach out, what to send, the first conversation, engagement shape.
- [Manifesto](https://xnlab.io/manifesto): Six statements on worldbuilding, atmosphere and restraint.
- [Atmospheres](https://xnlab.io/atmospheres): Six sensory vignettes — one per World Core. Prose snapshots of the rooms and moments we design.
- [Now](https://xnlab.io/now): A live note from inside the studio. What we are working on, reading, listening to, observing. Updated periodically.
- [Lab Records](https://xnlab.io/lab-records): Editorial cultural observations from inside the studio. Long-form reading on hospitality branding, cinematic luxury, music worldbuilding, atmospheric design.
- [References / Library](https://xnlab.io/references): Curated set of books, architects, films, hotels and makers that inform the studio's work.
- [Contact](https://xnlab.io/contact): Apply for a project. By application only. Fields: name, email, brand, website, industry, project type, timeline, estimated investment (EUR), message.
- [Colophon](https://xnlab.io/imprint): Studio details, typography credits, technical stack, brief privacy and terms notes.

## Universe mythology

- **The Central Core** — dark crimson sphere of liquid obsidian glass with a metallic X forged inside. The studio itself.
- **ORUN** — observer of worlds. Records, never intervenes.
- **XIO** — reactive creature. Transforms through the shards released when a world becomes unstable.
- **Anomalies** — fractures in a Core release shards. Material for evolution, not errors.

## Practice

- Hospitality Systems — atmospheres designed to be remembered.
- Nightlife Atmospheres — dark, cinematic environments for cultural energy.
- Emotional Architecture — spaces shaped through silence, light and material.
- Living Identities — symbols, avatars and identities with presence.

## Engagement model

- Fixed-scope projects, paid in milestones (no hourly billing).
- Monthly Visual Engine for brands that need continuous creative direction.
- All pricing quoted in EUR.
- Four-movement process: Diagnose, Direct, Build, Activate.
- Selected clients: four to six brands per year.

## Contact

- Email: studio@xnlab.io
- Availability: By application only.
